name: Pan America 1250 Special
description: Get lost. Go anywhere and everywhere on the Pan America 1250 Special, with high-revving liquid-cooled V-twin power, semi-active suspension, and top-shelf components engineered to endure and explore.
beschreibung: Verliere dich. Fahre überall hin und erkunde alles mit der Pan America 1250 Special, ausgestattet mit einem hochdrehenden, flüssigkeitsgekühlten V-Twin-Motor, semi-aktiver Federung und erstklassigen Komponenten, die für Ausdauer und Entdeckungstouren entwickelt wurden.

specs.Valves: Chain-driven, DOHC, hydraulic self-adjusting lifters, intake & exhaust VVT; four valves per cylinder
specs.Air Cleaner: Downdraft intake, tuned velocity stacks, washable filter media
specs.Frame: Stressed-member, high strength low alloy steel trellis frame; stamped, cast, and forged junctions; MIG welded; aluminum forged mid-structure
specs.Front Fork: 47mm inverted fork with electronically adjustable semi-active damping control. Aluminum fork triple clamps
specs.Front Fork, Optional: 47mm inverted fork with electronically adjustable semi-active damping control and Adaptive Ride Height (ARH). Aluminum fork triple clamps
specs.Rear Shocks: Linkage-mounted monoshock with automatic electronic preload control and semi-active compression & rebound damping
specs.Rear Shocks, Optional: Linkage-mounted monoshock with automatic electronic preload control and semi-active compression & rebound damping and Adaptive Ride Height (ARH)
specs.Brakes, Caliper Type: Front: radially mounted, monoblock, 4-piston caliper; Rear: floating, single piston caliper
specs.Brakes, Rotor Type: Front: dual rotor, floating, tower- mounted; Rear: solid uniform expansion rotor
specs.Battery: Sealed, maintenance-free, absorbed glass mat (AGM) battery, 12V, 17.5Ah, 310 CCA at 0°F
specs.Charging: Three-phase, 45 Amp system (390 Watts @13 Volts, 1300 rpm, 585 Watts max power @ 13 Volts, 2500 rpm)
specs.Starting: 0.9 kW electric with direct drive starter motor engagement
specs.Lights (as per country regulation), Head: Daymaker™ Adaptive LED Headlamp with 6-segment LED banking lamp
specs.Lights (as per country regulation), Tail: All LED Tail/Stop lamp with signature tail lighting
specs.Gauges: 6.8 inch viewable area TFT display with speedometer, gear, odometer, fuel level, clock, trip, ambient temp, low temp alert, side stand down alert, TIP over alert, cruise, range and tachometer indication BT capable - phone pairing to access phone calls, music, navigation (H-D App ONLY)
specs.Vehicle Information Screen (Air temperat: TPMS, Engine temp, Battery Voltage, Ambient Air Temp
specs.Service Interval: First 1,000 miles (1,600 km), every 5,000 miles (8,000 km) thereafter

abmessungenDE:
```html
Dimensions: RA1250S Pan America® 1250 Special
Length: 89.4 in. (2.270 mm)
Overall Width: 38.4 in. (975 mm)

Seat Height, Laden (High seat position: 32 in. (814 mm)

Seat Height, Laden (High seat position with optional ARH suspension): 31.4 in. (797 mm)
Seat Height, Unladen (Low seat position): 33.4 in. (850 mm)
Seat Height, Unladen (High seat position): 34.4 in. (875 mm)
Seat Height, Unladen (Low seat position with optional ARH suspension): 32.7 in. (830 mm)
Seat Height, Unladen (High seat position with optional ARH suspension): 33.7 in. (855 mm)
Static Ground Clearance: 6.9 in. (175 mm)
Dynamic Ground Clearance (with optional suspension): 6.9 in. (175 mm)
Rake (steering head): 25
Fork Angle: 25
Trail: 4.3 in. (108 mm)
Wheelbase: 62.4 in. (1.585 mm)
Tires, Type: Michelin® Scorcher „Adventure“, Radial
Tires, Front Model: Scorcher Adventure
Tires, Front Specification: 120/70R19 60V
Tires, Rear Model: Scorcher Adventure
Tires, Rear Specification: 170/60R17 72V
Fuel Capacity: 5.6 gal. (21.2 l)
Reserve Fuel Capacity, Fuel Injection (warning light): 1 gal. (3.8 l)
Oil Capacity (w/filter): 4.75 qt. (4.5 l)
Transmission Capacity: N/V
Primary Chain Case Capacity: N/V
Coolant Capacity: 2.32 qt. (2.2 l)
Weight, As Shipped: 534 lb (242 kg)
Weight, In Running Order: 569 lb (258 kg)
Gross Vehicle Weight Rating: 1.003 lb (455 kg)
Gross Axle Weight Rating, Front: 399 lb (181 kg)
Gross Axle Weight Rating, Rear: 665 lb (302 kg)
Luggage Capacity -Volume: N/V

Engine: RA1250S Pan America® 1250 Special
Engine: Revolution® Max 1250
Valves: Kettengesteuert, DOHC, hydraulische selbstjustierende Stößel, Einlass- & Auslass-VVT; vier Ventile pro Zylinder
Bore: 4.134 in. (105 mm)
Stroke: 2.846 in. (72,3 mm)
Displacement: 76.4 cu in (1.252 cc)
Compression Ratio: 13.0:1
Fuel System: Elektronische sequenzielle Kraftstoffeinspritzung (ESPFI)
Air Cleaner: Downdraft-Ansaugung, abgestimmte Geschwindigkeitsleitbleche, waschbares Filtermedium
Exhaust: 2-in-1-in-1; Katalysator im Sammler
Lubrication System: Halbtrocken-Sumpf

Drivetrain: RA1250S Pan America® 1250 Special
Primary Drive: Zahnrad, 49/89 Übersetzungsverhältnis
Final Drive: Kette, 19/48 Übersetzungsverhältnis
Clutch: Mechanisch, 8 Platten nass, Assist & Slip, 1090N
Transmission: 6-Gang
Gear Ratios (overall) 1st: 13.11
Gear Ratios (overall) 2nd: 9.687
Gear Ratios (overall) 3rd: 7.509
Gear Ratios (overall) 4th: 6.057
Gear Ratios (overall) 5th: 5.08
Gear Ratios (overall) 6th: 4.436

Chassis: RA1250S Pan America® 1250 Special
Frame: Bestandteil eines hochfesten niedriglegierten Stahlgitterrahmens; gestanzte, gegossene und geschmiedete Verbindungen; MIG-geschweißt; Aluminium geschmiedete Mittelstruktur
Swingarm: Einteiliges Druckguss-Aluminium
Front Fork: 47-mm-Upside-down-Gabel mit elektrisch einstellbarer, halbaktiver Dämpferregelung. Aluminium-Gabeloberteile
Front Fork, Optional: 47-mm-Upside-down-Gabel mit elektrisch einstellbarer, halbaktiver Dämpferregelung und adaptiver Ride Height (ARH). Aluminium-Gabeloberteile
Rear Shocks: Anlenkungsmonoshock mit automatischer elektronischer Vorspannungsregelung und halbaktiver Zug- & Druckstufendämpfung
Rear Shocks, Optional: Anlenkungsmonoshock mit automatischer elektronischer Vorspannungsregelung und halbaktiver Zug- & Druckstufendämpfung und adaptiver Ride Height (ARH)
Wheels, Optional Style Type: Eloxiertes Aluminium, schlauchlos eingespeicht
Wheels, Front Type: Aluminiumguss, satin schwarz
Wheels, Front Diameter: 19 in. (483 mm)
Wheels, Front Width: 3 in. (76 mm)
Wheels, Rear Type: Aluminiumguss, satin schwarz
Wheels, Rear Diameter: 17 in. (432 mm)
Wheels, Rear Width: 4.5 in. (114 mm)
Brakes, Caliper Type: Vorne: Radial montiert, Monoblock, 4-Kolben-Bremssattel; Hinten: Schwimmend, Einkolben-Bremssattel
Brakes, Rotor Type: Vorne: Doppelscheibe, schwimmend, turmmontiert; Hinten: Solider, gleichmäßig erweiterter Rotor
Brakes, Front Diameter: 12.6 in. (320 mm)
Brakes, Front Thickness: 0.17 in. (4.5 mm)
Brakes, Front is dual: Ja
Brakes, Rear Diameter: 11 in. (280 mm)
Brakes, Rear Thickness: 0.2 in. (5 mm)
Brakes, Anti-Lock Braking System (ABS): Standard
Suspension Travel, Front: 7.5 in. (191 mm)
Suspension Travel, Rear: 7.5 in. (191 mm)

Performance: RA1250S Pan America® 1250 Special
Engine Torque Testing Method: J1349
Engine Torque: 95 ft-lb (129 Nm)
Engine Torque (rpm): 6.750
Power: 150 PS / 112 kW @ 8.750 U/min
Lean Angle Testing Method: J1168
Lean Angle, Right (deg.): 42
Lean Angle, Left (deg.): 42

Electric: RA1250S Pan America® 1250 Special
Battery: Versiegelt, wartungsfrei, absorbierte Glasmatten-Batterie (AGM), 12V, 17.5Ah, 310 CCA bei 0°F
Charging: Dreiphasensystem, 45 Amp (390 Watt @ 13 Volt, 1.300 U/min, max. Leistung 585 Watt @ 13 Volt, 2.500 U/min)
Starting: 0.9 kW elektrisch mit Direktantrieb-Anlasser
Lights (as per country regulation), Headlamp: Daymaker™ Adaptiver LED-Scheinwerfer mit 6-Segment-LED-Schwenkleuchte
Lights (as per country regulation), Tail/Stop: Alle LED-Rück-/Bremsleuchte mit Signatur-Heckleuchte
Lights (as per country regulation), Front Signal Lights: LED-Bullet-Blinker
Lights, Rear Turn Signals: LED-Bullet-Blinker
Gauges: Sichtbarer Bereich von 6,8 Zoll TFT-Display mit Tacho, Gang, Kilometerzähler, Kraftstoffstand, Uhr, Trip, Umgebungstemperatur, Niedrigtemperatur-Warnung, Seitenständer runter-Warnung, Umkippschutz, Cruise, Reichweite und Drehzahlmesseranzeige, BT-fähig - Telefonanbindung für Anrufe, Musik, Navigation (nur H-D-App)
Auxiliary Lamps: N/V
Electric Power Outlet: USB-C, Ausgang 5V bei 2,4 Amp
GPS System: N/V
Reverse Gear: N/V

Fuel Economy & CO₂ Emissions: RA1250S Pan America® 1250 Special
Fuel Economy Testing Method: Geschätzt Stadt/Autobahn
Fuel Economy: 46 mpg (5,1 l/100 km)

Infotainment: RA1250S Pan America® 1250 Special
Infotainment System: N/V
Screen Size: 6.8 in. (173 mm)
Type: Farb-TFT mit Touch
Watts Per Channel: N/V
